prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-BUCKETCLASSIFER-7PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Dirt Sifting 1/4" Classifier Screen Set with 10L Collapsible Bucket Gold Panning Kit Description: Whether you're new to gold panning or are an experienced gold prospector, you know how important it is to be able to successfully and efficiently classify your raw material down to usable paydirt, either for panning or to run through a sluice box to find gold nuggets, gems or other. The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket, collapsible stand and classifier screen does just this in just a few easy steps.

The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with the included ASR Outdoor sifting pan; together they make a an efficient classification system that is easy to set up and take down, lightweight and reliable. The collapsible bucket is a lightweight alternative to a traditional 5 gallon bucket, which can be heavy and cumbersome to use, as well as carry to and from your gold claim site. To use the bucket and stand combo, you simply slide the four arms into the base and rotate until they lock in place. Then place the collapsible bucket over the tops of the arms and secure. Next, add your sifter and you're ready to start classifying your raw material.

The classifier screen we've included in this gold panning kit is made from high impact, durable ABS plastic and will stand up to lots of gold prospecting equipment wear and tear. This sifting screens will allow you to classify down material to usable paydirt, removing larger unwanted materials like rocks and gravels, leaving you with just sand, fine gravels and hopefully gold nuggets. And, as mentioned, the sifters are designed to be stacked on top of the collapsible bucket for quick and efficient processing of unclassified paydirt.

The collapsible bucket is made from BPA free silicone, features a sturdy carrying handle, bottom finger indentation and water pouring channel; the bucket can also be employed for tons of other uses outside of gold panning kits like fishing, gardening, as an ice bucket, for camping and much more Search Terms: gem mining tools metal detector sifting pans sieve classifier screens gold nuggets metal detecting accessories camping gear sluice box gold bar geology rock hounding tools sediment filter paydirt outdoor sports hobby Features: - 10L COLLAPSIBLE BUCKET WITH STAND: Space saving, compact and an incredibly useful tool to include with your gold prospecting equipment; the collapsible bucket is a lightweight alternative to a traditional 5 gallon bucket, which can be heavy and cumbersome to carry to and from your gold claim site - 1/4" CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Included sifting pan classifier screen is used to efficiently classify raw material down to paydirt for further gold panning or to run through a sluice box; the collapsible stand is fast and easy to put together and sturdy enough to support the weight of several sifter screens up to 30lbs - MESH BAG INCLUDED: A handy mesh bag is included to make carrying the collapsible bucket and stand components easier, while allowing for tidy and organized storage when you're not utilizing your gold prospecting equipment - COLLAPSIBLE BUCKET FEATURES: The collapsible bucket is made from BPA free silicone, features a sturdy carrying handle, hang tab, bottom finger indentation and water pouring channel; the bucket can also be employed for tons of other uses outside of gold panning kits like fishing, gardening, as an ice bucket, for camping and much more - METAL DETECTOR ACCESSORIES: This sifting screen combo will allow you to classify down material to usable paydirt, removing larger unwanted materials like rocks and gravels, leaving you with just sand, fine gravels and hopefully gold nuggets and treasures === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
